mapper.sql: select u.user_id, u.user_tg_id, u.user_tg_name, u.user_tg_username, u.user_avatar, u.user_type, u.level, u.super_user_id, u.super_user_tg_id, u.p_path, u.shareholder_id, u.salt, u.pay_password, u.google_key, u.lan_key, u.phone, u.email, u.freeze_status, u.handle_freeze_status, u.ip, u.ip_addr, u.channel_id, u.sign_time, u.sign, u.login_time, u.create_time, u.update_time, u.update_by, u.follow_status, u.has_set_rtp, u.bot_status, ut.merchant_tag_codes AS merchant_tag_codes from t_user u LEFT JOIN t_user_merchant_tag ut ON u.user_id = ut.user_id
mapper.select: where a.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.sql:
select a.user_id, a.user_tg_id, a.user_tg_name, a.user_tg_username, a.user_avatar, a.user_type, a.`level`, a.super_user_id, a.super_user_tg_id, a.p_path, a.shareholder_id, a.salt, a.pay_password, a.google_key, a.lan_key, a.phone, a.email, a.freeze_status, a.handle_freeze_status, a.ip, a.source, a.ip_addr, a.channel_id, a.sign_time, a.sign, a.login_time, a.create_time, a.update_time, a.update_by, a.follow_status, a.has_set_rtp, a.bot_status, utm.merchant_tag_codes AS merchant_tag_codes, d.fingerprint
, COALESCE(b.amount, 0) as cumulativeBetVolume
, COALESCE(b.amount, 0) as bonusAmount
, COALESCE(b.amount, 0) as cumulativeRecharge
, COALESCE(c.amount, 0) as usdtBalanceAmount
from t_user as a LEFT JOIN t_user_merchant_tag utm ON a.user_id = utm.user_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT user_id, fingerprint, create_time, -- 给每个 user_id 的记录按时间倒序排名 ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY user_id ORDER BY create_time DESC ) AS rn FROM t_user_login_history ) AS d ON a.user_id = d.user_id AND d.rn = 1
left join t_user_ext AS b ON a.user_id = b.user_id and b.type = 2
left join t_user_ext AS b ON a.user_id = b.user_id and b.type = 6
left join t_user_ext AS b ON a.user_id = b.user_id and b.type = 7
left join t_user_wallet as c on a.user_id = c.user_id and c.currency_id = 6

select a.user_id, a.user_tg_id, a.user_tg_name, a.user_tg_username, a.user_avatar, a.user_type, a.`level`, a.super_user_id, a.super_user_tg_id, a.p_path, a.shareholder_id, a.salt, a.pay_password, a.google_key, a.lan_key, a.phone, a.email, a.freeze_status, a.handle_freeze_status, a.ip, a.source, a.ip_addr, a.channel_id, a.sign_time, a.sign, a.login_time, a.create_time, a.update_time, a.update_by, a.follow_status, a.has_set_rtp, a.bot_status, utm.merchant_tag_codes AS merchant_tag_codes from t_user as a LEFT JOIN t_user_merchant_tag utm ON a.user_id = utm.user_id
mapper.insert:
insert into t_user
user_tg_id, user_tg_name, user_tg_username, user_avatar, user_type, level, super_user_id, super_user_tg_id, salt, pay_password, google_key, lan_key, phone, email, password, source, freeze_status, handle_freeze_status, ip, ip_addr, channel_id, sign_time, sign, login_time, create_time, update_time, update_by, follow_status, has_set_rtp, bot_status,
#{userTgId}, #{userTgName}, #{userTgUsername}, #{userAvatar}, #{userType}, #{level}, #{superUserId}, #{superUserTgId}, #{salt}, #{payPassword}, #{googleKey}, #{lanKey}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{password}, #{source}, #{freezeStatus}, #{handleFreezeStatus}, #{ip}, #{ipAddr}, #{channelId}, #{signTime}, #{sign}, #{loginTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{updateBy}, #{followStatus}, #{hasSetRtp}, #{botStatus},
mapper.delete:
delete from t_user where user_id in
#{userId}
mapper.select: select ifnull(count(1), 0) as userNum from `t_user`

select user_id from `t_user` where channel_id in
#{id}
select user_id from `t_user` where channel_id = #{channelId} and create_time >= DATE_FORMAT(#{date},'%Y-%m-%d 00:00:00') and create_time <= DATE_FORMAT(#{date},'%Y-%m-%d 23:59:59')
SELECT channel_id AS channelId, COUNT(user_id) AS registerNum FROM t_user WHERE create_time >= #{start} AND create_time < #{end} GROUP BY channel_id ORDER BY registerNum DESC

SELECT DISTINCT u.user_id AS userId, u.user_tg_id AS userTgId, u.user_tg_name AS userTgName, u.user_tg_username AS userTgUsername, u.channel_id AS channelId, c.channel_name AS channelName FROM t_user u LEFT JOIN t_channel c ON u.channel_id = c.id WHERE u.user_id IN ( SELECT user_id FROM t_order_amount WHERE user_id IS NOT NULL AND order_status = 1 AND TRIM(IFNULL(from_address,'')) = #{address} UNION SELECT user_id FROM t_order_law_withdraw WHERE user_id IS NOT NULL AND order_status = 4 AND ( TRIM(IFNULL(from_addr,'')) = #{address} OR ( bind_data IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(bind_data) != '' AND ( JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(bind_data, '$.bindData.address')) = #{address} OR JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(bind_data, '$.address')) = #{address} ) ) ) ) ORDER BY u.user_id DESC LIMIT 500
